pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the project's target Java version from 17 to 21 to align with the new runtime environment.
Add JJWT API dependency to enable JWT token generation and validation for security features.
Add JJWT implementation dependency to provide the runtime support for JWT operations.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency to handle JSON serialization/deserialization for JWT claims.
Add MapStruct dependency to facilitate type-safe bean mapping between DTOs and entities.
Refactor maven-compiler-plugin to use a unified configuration with explicit annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct, fixing compilation issues.
Add Lombok MapStruct binding to ensure correct interaction between Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors.
Explicitly disable resource filtering in the build configuration to prevent potential issues with binary files or specific resource handling.
Define explicit UTF-8 encoding properties for source and reporting to ensure consistent character handling.
